composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and complete the backend code in main.py
- Ensure the Flask app correctly locates and renders all eight frontend templates from the 'templates/' directory, especially fixing the TemplateNotFound error for 'dashboard.html'.
- Verify and implement all routing for the eight pages as per the requirements document, ensuring each route corresponds to the correct frontend template.
- Maintain and improve file read/write operations for all data files in the 'data/' directory using plain text.
- Implement business logic for loading, filtering, adding inquiries, managing favorites, and rendering templates.
- Ensure the website starts from the Dashboard page at route '/'.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to confirm template file names and structure match backend render_template calls.
composition.Programmer 2:
Develop and complete all eight frontend HTML templates in the 'templates/' directory
- Create and/or verify the presence of all required template files  dashboard.html, property_search.html, property_details.html, property_inquiry.html, my_inquiries.html, my_favorites.html, agents.html, locations.html.
- Ensure all specified elements with their correct IDs are included as per the requirements document.
- Implement page structure, layout, and placeholders for dynamic data to be rendered by the backend.
- Use Flask route URLs in the frontend code instead of direct HTML file names.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure template file names and element IDs match backend expectations.
